summary: Comprehensive testing of Hytale World Builder P2 features completed successfully. All 22 backend API endpoints working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI fully functional with all P2 features operational including templates, import/export, AI auto-generation, collaboration, and 3D preview.
passed_tests: P2: Templates endpoint returns all 5 templates (adventure, peaceful, challenge, exploration, dungeon_crawler)
P2: Create from template generates worlds with auto-generated zones and prefabs (261 zones, 19 prefabs for adventure template)
P2: Import world supports both our JSON format and Hytale format
P2: AI auto-generate successfully populates worlds using natural language prompts (generated 23 zones, 15 prefabs)
P2: Export prefab format (.prefab.json) with proper Hytale mod structure
P2: Export JAR format with base64-encoded mod package (13,290 bytes)
P2: 3D preview returns height map data with proper dimensions and render settings
P2: Collaboration session management (join/leave/status) working correctly
Frontend template dialog shows all 5 templates with proper selection
Frontend import dialog accepts and processes JSON configurations
Frontend AI Auto-Generate dialog with prompt input and provider selection
Frontend 4 export buttons (JSON, Hytale, Prefab, JAR) all functional
Frontend collaboration toggle button with user count display
Frontend 3D preview button opens preview dialog
AI provider selector with GPT-5.2, Claude, and Gemini options
Template generation creates correct zone distribution based on template type
All existing MVP features continue to work (world CRUD, zone/prefab management, terrain controls)
EMERGENT_LLM_KEY properly configured and AI integration working
Map canvas displays generated content correctly
Terrain panel with all 5 sliders functional
